creator: alexhenrique.monte@gmail.com
text:
When a try to do a 'make install clean' on ghostscript8 port, the system shows the error below:

./bin/../sobin/libgs.so: undefined reference to `lips_mode3format_encode'
gmake[1]: *** [bin/../sobin/gsc] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11/work/ghostscript-8.71'
gmake: *** [so] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Go to /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8 and type 'make install clean'
